title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: The video surveys Google's DiffusionGemma for faster text generation, Gemini 3.5 Live Translate for real-time multilingual voice translation, Xiaomi's MiMo Code for long-horizon coding tasks, and OpenAI's IPO filing. The author argues AI is entering a phase prioritizing speed, cost efficiency, and business scale alongside intelligence.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open model from Google that generates text through a diffusion method rather than the standard token-by-token approach. The shift matters because the model reaches up to four times faster performance on dedicated GPUs. Key details include a 256-token canvas and built-in self-correction capabilities.
